sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84821" key="poluete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-ετέω</orth>, <sense id="n84821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grant long life, PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2181" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2181</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
